zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Holand於大約1356年出生在英國藍卡爾時，她的父親Robert de Holand VI25歲，母親Alice de Lisle21歲。她於1372年與Sir John Lovel, KN, KG結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1423年5月7日在英國享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Holand于大约1356年出生在英国藍卡爾时，她的父亲Robert de Holand VI25岁，母亲Alice de Lisle21岁。她于1372年与Sir John Lovel, KN, KG结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1423年5月7日在英国享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Holand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Holland
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Holand was born about 1356, in Lancashire, England, her father, Robert de Holand VI, was 25 and her mother, Alice de Lisle, was 21. She married Sir John Lovel, KN, KG in 1372. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 7 May 1423, in England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Holand est née environ 1356, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Holand VI, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice de Lisle, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Lovel, KN, KG en 1372. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 mai 1423, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Holand um 1356 in Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Holand VI 25 und ihre Mutter Alice de Lisle 21. Sie hat 1372 Sir John Lovel, KN, KG geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Mai 1423 im Alter von 68 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Holand è nata il circa 1356 nel Lancashire, England, sua padre, Robert de Holand VI, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Alice de Lisle, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Lovel, KN, KG nel 1372. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 maggio 1423, nel England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Holandが約1356年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Holand VIは25歳，母Alice de Lisleは21歳であった。1372年にSir John Lovel, KN, KGと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1423年5月7日にイギリスで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Holand(이)가 대략 1356년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Holand VI(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Lisle(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1372년 Sir John Lovel, KN, KG(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1423년 5월 7일 영국에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Holand nasceu aproximadamente 1356, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Holand VI, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Lisle, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Lovel, KN, KG em 1372. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 7 de maio de 1423, em Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Holand родилась около 1356 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Holand VI было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Lisle, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Lovel, KN, KG в 1372 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 мая 1423 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud de Holand nació aproximadamente 1356, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Holand VI, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alice de Lisle, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir John Lovel, KN, KG en 1372. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de mayo de 1423, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
